releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Changelog

- On the "Planned" tab when creating a task, added a checkbox: "Shift order of existing tasks": when checked, the order of tasks with order equal to or greater than the created task is incremented by +1
- When postponing a task, added a checkbox: "Shift order of existing tasks": when checked, the order of tasks with order equal to or greater than the postponed task is incremented by +1
- On the Knowledge Base tab, added an "Import JSON" button that allows importing any exported plan, enabling direct sharing of IDPs (Individual Development Plans)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# ChangeLog

- On the Statistics tab, in 'Section statistics' block, sections are sorted according to the plugin settings.
- On the Statistics tab, in 'Forecast completion' block, material types are sorted according to the plugin settings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# ChangeLog

- Import functionality enhanced: plans can now be imported even if corresponding task types and sections are missing - tasks will be categorized under "Other" sections
- Added section filter to the "Planned" tab
- On "Planned" and "Knowledge Base" tabs, only task types and sections with at least one task are now displayed
- Disabled task types have been removed from statistics
- Added "Other" task types and sections to statistics
- Statistics now includes forecasts for weeks, months, and years instead of optimistic/pessimistic forecasts

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Personal Development Plan Plugin - Release Notes

## Version 1.0.5

### 🚀 New Features

#### **Enhanced Organization & Navigation**

- **Added "Other Types" tab** (📦) on "In Progress" and "Knowledge Base" pages
  - Displays items with types not found in your enabled material types
  - Only appears when there are items with unrecognized types
- **Added "Other Sections" tab** on "Knowledge Base" pages
  - Shows items with sections not configured in your settings
  - Only visible when items with unknown sections exist

#### **New Settings & Controls**

- [Issue 1](https://github.com/artemkorsakov/personal-development-plan/issues/1): **"Move completed files to History Folder" checkbox** in General Settings
  - Automatically relocate completed learning materials to a dedicated history folder
- [Issue 2](https://github.com/artemkorsakov/personal-development-plan/issues/2): **Delete buttons (×)** for Material Types and Sections in settings
  - Quick removal of unwanted items
  - Protection against deleting the last remaining item in each category

#### **Expanded Example Plans Library**

[Issue 2](https://github.com/artemkorsakov/personal-development-plan/issues/2): Added three new comprehensive learning plans:

- **Personal Development & Self-Improvement Resources** - Curated collection for personal growth, mindset development, and habit building
- **Time Management & Productivity System** - Essential resources for mastering time management and work organization
- **Personal Effectiveness & Performance Optimization** - Strategies for maximizing personal effectiveness and energy management

### 📚 Documentation Updates

- [Added examples for the new organizational features](https://artemkorsakov.github.io/personal-development-plan/)

### 💡 Usage Tips

- Use the "Other" tabs to identify and categorize uncategorized learning materials
- Explore the new example plans to jumpstart your personal development journey
- Utilize delete buttons to maintain a clean and relevant set of material types and sections

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Version 1.0.0

Initial release of Personal Development Plan plugin.

This version includes core features such as:

- 🛠️ In Progress - Active tasks in progress
- ⏳ Planned - Materials planned for study
- 📚 Knowledge Base - Non-detailed training materials
- 🔍 Source - External resources for replenishing the knowledge base
- 📊 Statistics - Analysis of development progress
- 🕰️ History - Archive of completed tasks
- 📂 Examples - Ready-made Knowledge Base templates
- 📌 Settings
